meta.title: Attack Surface Analysis On Satellites
meta.description:
Sheng-Hao focuses on the difficult-to-repair threat to LEO satellite systems. He analyzes the potential abuse by attackers of these already exploited systems. 

Sheng-Hao categorizes the attack vectors and develops a LEO
Kill Chain threat model. He shows how it can be used with typical LEO protocols and equipment.
